title: cracca rugelii
intro: Cracca rugelii, also known as Wild Bean or American Licorice, is a perennial legume native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Cracca rugelii include relief from respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as potential anti-diabetic and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Cracca rugelii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support digestive health and reduce inflammation.
